subcodes.first_line: The missive from your honored presence was received and laid before Him, and this is what hath streamed forth from the Source of Utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب وارد ملاحظه شد و معروض گشت و هذا ما صدر من مصدر الخطاب
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @personal instructions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
